results.title: La Segunda - a hotbed of talent
results.description: “The Argentinian coach is also likely to bring in some South American talent as he implements his work ethics in all areas of the first team.”

results.title: ‘Impossible to ignore’ – Celtic fan group aim X-rated banner at Robbie Keane amid rumours he’s to be next boss
results.description: ROBBIE KEANE flew into South Korea last night — with his chances of landing the Celtic job still up in the air. The ex-Hoops loan striker is in Seoul to play in a Liverpool Legends v Barcelona Legends game. But the Green Brigade fan group have urged Bhoys chiefs NOT to appoint the ex-Ireland forward...

results.title: IND vs AFG: Sai Sudharsan to bat at No. 3, India head coach Gambhir confirms ahead of Afghanistan Test
results.description: Sudharsan struck 87 runs against West Indies in New Delhi and was dropped for the first Test against South Africa in Kolkata a month later before returning one Test later.
